news.title: After Arcellx buyout close, Gilead trims 108 jobs at CAR-T biotech's Redwood City outpost
news.snippet: With Gilead's $7.8 billion buyout of Arcellx complete, the California pharma is consolidating some of the workforce at the acquired company.

news.title: Madrigal continues MASH deal spree with $1B biobucks license for Arrowhead asset rejected by J&J
news.snippet: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals has struck a backloaded deal for the global license to an Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals phase 1 asset for patients with metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH).

news.title: Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker '26: Cytospire's $83M for TCEs; Vivacta snags $50M+ series A
news.snippet: The Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker records venture capital rounds of $50 million or more secured by biotechs.

news.title: Olympus, EndoRobotics in distribution pact for robot-assisted endoscopic tech
news.snippet: Olympus inked a collaboration deal for the global distribution of robot-assisted technologies produced by South Korea’s EndoRobotics with a focus on endoscopic procedures.

news.title: Sanofi expands AI capabilities, investing $294M to scale Toronto hub
news.snippet: Sanofi is supercharging its artificial intelligence capabilities. The French pharma is investing $294 million to expand its global AI center of excellence in Toronto, kicking off a scale-up of the dig

news.title: Pfizer’s $2.3B Trillium bet ends in failure as remaining CD47 blocker scrapped along with T-cell engager
news.snippet: Pfizer’s $2.3 billion bet on Trillium Therapeutics doesn’t look like it will ever pay out, with the Big Pharma abandoning the second and final clinical-stage candidate from that acquisition.

news.title: Foundation Medicine links with Fulgent Genetics to offer new gene test
news.snippet: Roche’s Foundation Medicine has linked with Fulgent Genetics to offer a new diagnostic test that identifies a person’s genetic makeup that can determine how they metabolize and process drugs.

news.title: Viridian’s Tepezza rival racks up second phase 3 win, clearing path to FDA
news.snippet: A second phase 3 trial of Viridian Therapeutics’ anti-IGF-1R antibody has hit its primary endpoint as the company prepares to file for FDA approval next year and challenge Amgen for a blockbuster mark

news.title: The American Biotech Innovation Alliance launches to unify domestic strategy amid global competition
news.snippet: A cross-section of biotech leaders is launching the American Biotech Innovation Alliance (ABIA) with the goal of uniting stakeholders and defining a national strategy to sustain and expand U.S. leader

news.title: Private Swiss biotechs hit record funding amid slowdown in public financing
news.snippet: Funding for privately traded Swiss biotechs hit a new high last year, climbing 38% to 1.15 billion Swiss francs ($1.5 billion). However, a relatively small pool of companies drove the funding jump whi

news.title: Vertex drops Moderna-partnered inhaled cystic fibrosis candidate after unresolved tolerability issues
news.snippet: After pausing a trial for a Moderna-partnered cystic fibrosis candidate due to subpar tolerability, Vertex Pharmaceuticals has now decided to discontinue the program entirely.

news.title: Passage launches strategic review and 75% layoffs after gene therapy path blocked by FDA
news.snippet: After some tough feedback from the FDA on the path forward for its lead gene therapy, Passage Bio has launched a strategic review and set out a plan to whittle down its headcount by 75%.

news.title: ‘A concerted industry-government effort’: Strand Therapeutics CEO Jake Becraft on FDA’s IND reform and China

news.title: Takeda pivotal trial win improves convenience for PID patients relative to HyQvia
news.snippet: A pivotal study of a Takeda primary immunodeficiency disease (PID) asset has hit its primary endpoint, demonstrating pharmacokinetic (PK) comparability between the asset and HyQvia, which was approved

news.title: Mirum maps FDA path after anti-itch candidate scores ph. 2 win
news.snippet: Mirum Pharmaceuticals is moving toward an FDA filing after its small molecule volixibat significantly reduced severe itching in patients with a rare liver disease.

news.title: After Alzheimer's agitation nod, Axsome jacks up Auvelity's peak sales projection to $8B
news.snippet: Fresh off gaining an FDA expansion for Auvelity as a treatment for agitation associated with Alzheimer’s disease, Axsome Therapeutics has projected peak sales for the non-antipsychotic drug to reach $

news.title: BioNTech to slash 1,860 jobs, exit sites in Germany and Singapore in major manufacturing pullback
news.snippet: The German vaccine maker plans to wind down operations at a handful of its sites in Germany plus one in Singapore, putting as many as 1,860 jobs on the chopping block.

news.title: Novartis to close German manufacturing site, cutting 220 jobs
news.snippet: Novartis is continuing its multiyear overhaul with new plans to shutter its production facility in Wehr, Germany, by 2028. The move, announced Tuesday, will eliminate about 220 jobs, according to Nova

news.title: Pfizer delivers strong Q1 but keeps guidance steady amid COVID seasonality
news.snippet: With a better-than-expected first quarter in the books, Pfizer—continuing to grapple with the post-pandemic overhang from its COVID-19 franchise—is sticking with the sales forecast it set earlier this

news.title: Prolific Machines sets monoclonal antibody manufacturing record with light-controlled platform
news.snippet: Though largely operating in the background until recently, Prolific Machines’ optogenetic approach to biomanufacturing is set to make waves thanks to the achievement of an impressive milestone in mono

news.title: Sanofi expands AI capabilities, investing $294M to scale Toronto hub
news.snippet: Sanofi is supercharging its artificial intelligence capabilities. The French pharma is investing $294 million to expand its global AI center of excellence in Toronto, kicking off a scale-up of the dig

news.title: Eyeing CAR-T autoimmune first, Kyverna hires pharma veteran as CCO
news.snippet: Kyverna Therapeutics is on the cusp of a historic first: getting a CAR-T therapy approved for an autoimmune disease—and now it’s looking to boost its commercial chops as it nears the finish line.

news.title: Cytokinetics' Myqorzo succeeds in landmark cardiomyopathy trial
news.snippet: Cytokinetics has aced a phase 3 trial of Myqorzo in patients with non-obstructive hypertrophic cardiomyopathy. The South San Francisco company is bidding to make Myqorzo the first treatment approved i

news.title: Neurocrine cites work disruption data to make case for timely movement disorder diagnosis
news.snippet: Neurocrine Biosciences has shared survey data showing how tardive dyskinesia affects the ability of patients and caregivers to work, supporting the company’s case for timely treatment of the movement

news.title: Newly formed Keenova launches ‘Don't Be a Viking’ campaign for Dupuytren’s contracture
news.snippet: Created from the merger of Mallinckrodt and Endo last year, Keenova is launching its first Dupuytren's contracture campaign under its new moniker.

news.title: Regulatory tracker: Incyte earns FDA nod for extended-release Jakafi
news.snippet: In this tracker, Fierce Pharma is recording the regulatory progress of in-market products, including expansions into key geographies and new indications. Some of these updates may not meet the bar for

news.title: SCOTUS temporarily restores online access to abortion pill after appeals court ruling
news.snippet: The U.S. Supreme Court has temporarily reinstated online access to the abortion pill mifepristone after a federal appeals court in New Orleans ruled to prevent mifepristone from being prescribed over

news.title: CDMO Samsung Biologics estimates $102M impact stemming from ongoing union strike
news.snippet: The company chalks up a financial impact of about 150 billion Korean won ($102 million) from "preemptive production adjustments" made to mitigate potential manufacturing impacts, a spokesperson said.

news.title: After March cuts, Novartis trims another 60 roles at US headquarters
news.snippet: After submitting plans to cut 114 jobs tied to its U.S. headquarters in New Jersey in March, Novartis late last month added a handful of additional roles from the East Hanover site to its multiyear wo

news.title: STAT+: Pharma’s reputation among patient groups rose last year, but concerns remain over access and pricing
news.snippet: The pharma industry saw its reputation among patient groups inch up last year, a new survey finds, but concerns remain over access and pricing.

news.title: STAT+: Are analysts too quick to gloss over Lilly’s liver case?
news.snippet: Cytokinetics' Myqorzo's trial results, Johnson & Johnson's IBD therapy, and more biotech news from The Readout

news.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about RFK Jr. targeting antidepressants, J&J pushing an IBD drug, and more
news.snippet: HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. announced initiatives to rein in prescribing of SSRIs, the most widely used antidepressants

news.title: STAT+: Cytokinetics drug Myqorzo meets twin efficacy goals in study of genetic heart disease
news.snippet: A Cytokinetics heart disease drug — already approved in one indication — succeeded in another Phase 3 trial, a potential boost for sales.

news.title: STAT+: Johnson & Johnson advances IBD therapy, despite trial miss
news.snippet: A closely watched therapy developed by Johnson & Johnson failed to show a statistically meaningful improvement for IBD patients.

news.title: STAT+: French regulator fines Novo and Lilly over weight loss ad campaigns
news.snippet: France's medicines regulator has fined Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly over their weight loss ad campaigns.

news.title: Opinion: Mifepristone court ruling makes drug development riskier for everyone
news.snippet: The 5th Circuit’s ruling on mifepristone “is bad for health care access, and it’s also bad for innovation,” writes Grace E. Colón.

news.title: Supreme Court restores access to abortion pill mifepristone through telehealth, mail, and pharmacies
news.snippet: The Supreme Court on Monday restored broad access to the abortion pill mifepristone, blocking a ruling that had threatened to upend one of the main ways abortion is provided across the…

news.title: NHS cancer jab could save patients hours in hospital
news.snippet: Thousands of patients will be offered a new injectable form of an immunotherapy drug that takes minutes.

news.title: The struggle to get hold of medication in England is set to get worse
news.snippet: People living with conditions include heart problems, stroke risks, eye infections and bipolar are unable to get hold of the drugs they rely on.

news.title: 11 cancers on the rise in young people - scientists find first clue why it's happening
news.snippet: Researchers stress that simple lifestyle changes can still significantly reduce the risk of cancer.

news.title: UK healthy life expectancy falls by two years in past decade
news.snippet: Poor housing, obesity and the effects of deprivation have been suggested as underlying cause.
